title: Returning an Amazon Package
scene: 你要退一件网购的衣服。

turns.cn: 您好，需要帮忙吗？
turns.en: Hi, can I help you?

turns.cn: 我要退这个亚马逊包裹。
turns.en: I need to return this Amazon package.

turns.cn: 请出示退货二维码。
turns.en: Please show me the return QR code.

turns.cn: 在这里，尺码不合适。
turns.en: Here it is. The size doesn't fit.

turns.cn: 好了，退款三到五个工作日到账。
turns.en: All set. Your refund will arrive in three to five business days.

turns.cn: 需要付退货运费吗？
turns.en: Do I need to pay return shipping?

turns.cn: 不用，亚马逊已经预付了。
turns.en: No, Amazon already covered it.

title: Missing Package
scene: 显示已签收但你没收到包裹。

turns.cn: 快递公司，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Shipping company. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我的包裹显示已送达，但我没收到。
turns.en: My package shows delivered, but I never got it.

turns.cn: 请提供追踪号码。
turns.en: May I have the tracking number?
One Z nine nine nine AA one oh one two three four five six seven eight four. It was yesterday afternoon.

turns.cn: 照片显示放在门口，您问过邻居吗？
turns.en: The photo shows it at your door. Have you checked with neighbors?

turns.cn: 问过了，没有。请启动调查。
turns.en: Yes, nothing. Please open an investigation.

turns.cn: 好的，四十八小时内有结果。
turns.en: Okay. We'll have an answer within forty-eight hours.

title: Wrong Item Received
scene: 你网购收到完全不对的东西。

turns.cn: 在线客服，请问什么问题？
turns.en: Online support. What's the issue?

turns.cn: 我订的是蓝牙耳机，收到的是手机壳。
turns.en: I ordered Bluetooth earbuds but got a phone case.

turns.cn: 非常抱歉，请发一张照片。
turns.en: We're very sorry. Please send a photo.

turns.cn: 已上传，我需要正确的商品。
turns.en: Done. I need the correct item.

turns.cn: 我们会重新发货，错货不用退回。
turns.en: We'll reship the right item. You can keep the wrong one.

turns.cn: 好的，大概几天到？
turns.en: Okay. How many days will it take?

turns.cn: 两到三个工作日。
turns.en: Two to three business days.

title: Price Match
scene: 你买完后发现别家更便宜，申请退差价。

turns.cn: 我上周买的电视，现在别家便宜五十块。
turns.en: I bought a TV last week. Another store has it fifty dollars cheaper now.

turns.cn: 您有价格保护的订单号吗？
turns.en: Do you have the order number for price protection?

turns.cn: 订单号12345，截图也发了。
turns.en: Order number one two three four five. I sent a screenshot too.

turns.cn: 符合政策，退您五十美元差价。
turns.en: You qualify. We'll refund the fifty-dollar difference.

turns.cn: 退到原支付方式吗？
turns.en: Will it go back to my original payment method?

turns.cn: 是的，三到五个工作日。
turns.en: Yes, within three to five business days.

title: Subscription Cancel
scene: 你打电话取消流媒体会员自动续费。

turns.cn: 会员服务，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Membership services. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我想取消下个月的自动续费。
turns.en: I'd like to cancel auto-renewal for next month.

turns.cn: 可以告诉我原因吗？也许有优惠。
turns.en: May I ask why? We might have a discount.

turns.cn: 最近用得少，下个月先停。
turns.en: I haven't been using it much. I'll pause for now.

turns.cn: 已取消，本月末前仍可使用。
turns.en: It's canceled. You can still use it until the end of this month.

turns.cn: 以后还能重新开通吗？
turns.en: Can I reactivate later?

turns.cn: 随时可以在账户里恢复。
turns.en: Anytime from your account settings.

title: Package Not Arrived
scene: 显示已签收但你没收到货，联系客服。

turns.cn: 网购客服，请问订单号？
turns.en: Online shopping support. Order number, please?

turns.cn: 订单8823，显示昨天签收了，但我没收到。
turns.en: Order eight eight two three. It says delivered yesterday, but I didn't get it.

turns.cn: 签收人是门卫吗？
turns.en: Was it signed for by the doorman?

turns.cn: 我问过了，他们说没有。
turns.en: I asked. They said they didn't receive it.

turns.cn: 我们联系快递核实，二十四小时内回复。
turns.en: We'll verify with the carrier and reply within twenty-four hours.

turns.cn: 如果找不到能重发吗？
turns.en: If it's lost, can you reship it?

turns.cn: 核实后可以重发或退款，您选。
turns.en: After verification, we can reship or refund, your choice.
